tasks.title: Add unique index on membership_subscription.stripe_subscription_id
tasks.description: Create Liquibase migration to add unique index on stripe_subscription_id to prevent duplicate subscriptions.
tasks.details:
- Create Liquibase migration file in src/main/resources/config/liquibase/changelog/
- Add createIndex with unique=true on membership_subscription.stripe_subscription_id
- Include comment explaining purpose (race condition prevention)
- Pattern based on existing unique constraint on event_ticket_transaction.stripe_payment_intent_id
tasks.testStrategy: Verify index is created correctly in database and prevents duplicate stripe_subscription_id values.

tasks.title: Enhance Stripe webhook handler for subscription events
tasks.description: Update existing webhook handler to process subscription-related Stripe events.
tasks.details:
- Enhance existing webhook handler
- Add handlers for subscription events:
  - checkout.session.completed
  - customer.subscription.created
  - customer.subscription.updated
  - customer.subscription.deleted
  - invoice.payment_succeeded
  - invoice.payment_failed
- Implement webhook signature verification
- Extract metadata from events
- Call appropriate service methods
- Add error handling and logging
- Follow pattern from TicketGenerationService for race condition prevention
tasks.testStrategy: Test webhook handlers with sample Stripe event payloads. Verify correct subscription updates.

tasks.title: Enhance billing endpoint for subscription management

tasks.testStrategy: Test endpoint with different subscription scenarios. Verify correct Checkout Session creation.

tasks.title: Implement subscription status transition logic
tasks.description: Add business logic for handling subscription status transitions based on events.
tasks.details:
- Implement status transition logic in MembershipSubscriptionService
- Handle transitions:
  - TRIAL → ACTIVE (trial ends, payment succeeds)
  - ACTIVE → PAST_DUE (payment fails)
  - PAST_DUE → ACTIVE (payment succeeds)
  - ACTIVE → CANCELLED (user cancels)
  - CANCELLED → EXPIRED (period ends)
- Add validation for valid transitions
- Update subscription dates during transitions
tasks.testStrategy: Test each transition scenario with unit tests. Verify correct status updates and date calculations.

tasks.title: Implement trial period calculation logic
tasks.description: Add logic for calculating trial periods and handling trial expirations.
tasks.details:
- Add trial period calculation in MembershipSubscriptionService
- Set trial_start and trial_end dates
- Set initial subscription_status to TRIAL when applicable
- Handle trial expiration
- Update current_period dates based on trial
- Handle Stripe trial period synchronization
tasks.testStrategy: Test trial period calculation with different scenarios. Verify correct date calculations and status updates.

tasks.title: Implement subscription cancellation logic
tasks.description: Add logic for handling subscription cancellations with proper status updates.
tasks.details:
- Add cancellation logic in MembershipSubscriptionService
- Set cancel_at_period_end flag
- Store cancellation_reason
- Cancel Stripe subscription at period end
- Handle immediate cancellation if needed
- Update subscription status when period ends
- Set cancelled_at timestamp
tasks.testStrategy: Test cancellation scenarios with different timing options. Verify correct status updates and Stripe calls.

tasks.title: Implement subscription upgrade/downgrade logic
tasks.description: Add logic for handling plan changes (upgrades and downgrades) with proper proration.
tasks.details:
- Add upgrade/downgrade logic in MembershipSubscriptionService
- Create new Stripe Subscription with new Price ID
- Cancel old Stripe Subscription
- Create new membership_subscription record
- Set old subscription status to CANCELLED
- Handle proration if applicable
- Update current_period dates
tasks.testStrategy: Test upgrade and downgrade scenarios. Verify correct subscription creation and cancellation.
